form.formComment: He is resuming after a nine months break. Not seen since he finished last of 7 at Pompadour July 26 over 1600m, soft track; 38 len behind Texas Pearl with 54.5kg. On debut ran last of 11 at this track June 11 over 1600m, soft track; 45 len behind Al Rasha with 57.5kg at $11. Unlikely to feature.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Only had one start last campaign 4th of 9 at Pau All Weather on January 13 over 2000m, 14 len behind Al Ghadeer carrying 60.5kg at $25. First up last campaign 10th of 19 at Riyadh Dirt in SAULR on March 15 2025 over 1600m, 21 len behind Najeeb Alzaman carrying 56.5kg at $17. Excellent chance.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 30-day let-up. At the latest run 2nd of 9 at Mont-de-Marsan on March 12 over 1600m, on rain affected going; long-neck behind Mamamia Hipolyte with 58kg at $1.60. Before that 2nd of 12 at Pau All Weather on February 8 over 2000m, 0.5 len behind Hilal with 56.5kg at $2.40. Winning prospects enhanced by the inside stall.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Last outing 3rd of 9 at Mont-de-Marsan on March 12 over 1600m, on a wet track; 7 len behind Mamamia Hipolyte with 52.5kg at $19.
